events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a pressure testing situation where the field condition matches the referenced drawing/manufacturer sheet - tags, ratings, and layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block is current. Reference material is ASME B31.3 §345.

This seems like a straightforward pass situation - everything lines up, no defects flagged.
